reasoning: The FRED historical data shows a general downward trend in the 12-month CD deposit rate over the past year (dropping from 1.88 in Sep 2024 to 1.62 in Jun 2025), reflecting what has likely been an environment of falling rates or Fed rate cuts. While the rate jumped unusually in August 2025 to 1.76, the linear trend strongly predicts a reversion downwards to roughly 1.65 by late September. The linear model’s analytical estimate of a 25% chance of exceeding 1.76 provides a strong baseline. Following the explicit instructions to let uncertainty regress toward 0.5 for more distant horizons, I predict a 30% chance for the first date incrementally increasing to 45% for the furthest date.
